title: Trimmed
writer: Wallace Clifton, Hapsburg Liebe, Arthur F. Statter
actors: Hoot Gibson, Patsy Ruth Miller, Alfred Hollingsworth
plot: Returning from service in the A. E. F., Dale Garland is given a rousing reception by his townsmen. County political boss Nebo Slayter persuades the community to nominate Dale for sheriff--thinking he can be easily manipulated--aga...
